# Test fixtures

Small synthetic data files used by unit and integration tests.

Includes:

- `mini_aid_records.csv`       — 20 synthetic AID records covering all formats
- `mini_chembl_records.tsv`    — 10 synthetic ChEMBL activities
- `expected_t1.csv`            — Expected T1 output for the mini inputs

Fixtures are tracked in git (they are small).
